| Variant R bucket | rear exterior face near Y=+115 after reorientation | -Y | reference contains a broad rear face; exact flatness, footprint and brim clearance are not frozen | front collar and seam are late-build geometry<br>bulkhead wedges and longitudinal rails may create unsupported ledges<br>support removal through front must remain possible<br>sand/fill passages must not trap material | measure bed face and flatness<br>quantify overhangs/bridges<br>slicer trial<br>protect rear datum |

| Variant I enclosure | future perimeter around open bottom near Z=-95 | +Z | no current geometry; historic integral references are closed-bottom removable assemblies | front fairing and braces may become unsupported<br>support removal must remain accessible through bottom<br>hatch boundary could weaken bed footprint<br>sand/air traps | design and measure open-bottom perimeter<br>reserve hatch datum<br>grow braces gradually<br>prove support-removal path |
| Variant I hatch | not designed | not assigned | none | seal and flatness<br>separate-part warping<br>service access | future product-design task only |
